puzzles.title: Lumen Vault
puzzles.tagline: Flip brass mirrors to bend one ray of lamplight onto every gem.
puzzles.summary: A single light beam enters an 8x8 vault; tapping any brass mirror flips it between / and \ tilts, instantly re-routing the reflected beam. The goal is to have the beam pass through all four gems at once, in as few mirror flips as possible against a computed par. Visual style: a dark bronze-and-candlelight treasure vault with a glowing golden beam, brass medallion mirrors, and jewel-toned gems — any beam-routing / mirror-rotation optics mechanic would be a clone of this.

puzzles.title: Twin Lanterns
puzzles.tagline: Two lanterns, one wind — steer both home in the same breath.
puzzles.summary: Every swipe or arrow key moves TWO lanterns simultaneously in the same direction across a 7x7 night garden; rocks and the garden edge stop each lantern individually, which is the only way to break their lockstep. Win by resting both lanterns on their matching pedestals at the same moment, ideally in the BFS-computed par number of moves. Visuals: an indigo lantern-festival night with glowing amber and jade paper lanterns, a twinkling starfield, and warm serif festival typography.

puzzles.title: DELTA
puzzles.tagline: Chain neighboring tiles that differ by exactly 1. A perfect chain covers all 36.
puzzles.summary: A 6x6 grid of numbered tiles. Drag from tile to tile to build one long chain where each step moves to an adjacent tile whose value differs by exactly 1; dragging backward undoes a step. The goal is the longest possible chain, with a perfect solve covering all 36 tiles.
